name: Paracetamol
uses: Fever; mild to moderate pain (headache, toothache, body ache)
side_effects: Rare at normal doses; overdose causes liver damage

name: Amoxicillin
uses: Bacterial infections: throat, ear, urinary tract, chest
side_effects: Diarrhea; nausea; rash; allergic reaction

name: Ibuprofen
uses: Pain; fever; inflammation; arthritis; menstrual cramps
side_effects: Stomach upset; ulcers; kidney strain; increased bleeding
contraindications: Peptic ulcer; kidney disease; heart failure; pregnancy (3rd trimester)

name: Metformin
uses: Type 2 diabetes; prediabetes; PCOS
dosage_adult: 500mg twice daily with meals, increase gradually to 2000mg/day
side_effects: Nausea; diarrhea; metallic taste; lactic acidosis (rare)
contraindications: Kidney disease (eGFR<30); liver disease; heavy alcohol use
interactions: Contrast dye (hold before CT scan); alcohol (lactic acidosis risk)

name: Amlodipine
uses: Hypertension (high blood pressure); angina
side_effects: Ankle swelling; flushing; headache; palpitations

name: Omeprazole
uses: Acidity; GERD; peptic ulcer; H. pylori infection
side_effects: Headache; diarrhea; nausea; low magnesium (long term)

name: Cetirizine
uses: Allergic rhinitis; urticaria (hives); itching; hay fever
side_effects: Drowsiness; dry mouth; headache

name: Azithromycin
uses: Respiratory tract infections; skin infections; STIs; typhoid
side_effects: Nausea; diarrhea; abdominal pain; QT prolongation

name: Atorvastatin
uses: High cholesterol; cardiovascular disease prevention
side_effects: Muscle pain (myopathy); liver enzyme rise; headache
interactions: Clarithromycin (increased statin level); grapefruit juice; niacin

name: Metronidazole
uses: Bacterial vaginosis; amoebic dysentery; giardia; dental infections
side_effects: Metallic taste; nausea; dark urine; peripheral neuropathy (long term)

name: Ciprofloxacin
uses: Urinary tract infection; typhoid; diarrhea; respiratory infections
side_effects: Nausea; diarrhea; tendon rupture (rare); photosensitivity
contraindications: Pregnancy; children under 18 (joint risk); tendon disorders

name: Pantoprazole
uses: Acidity; GERD; peptic ulcer; Zollinger-Ellison syndrome
side_effects: Headache; diarrhea; abdominal pain; low magnesium (long term)

name: Salbutamol
uses: Asthma attack; bronchospasm; COPD; exercise-induced asthma
dosage_adult: 2-4 puffs (100mcg each) every 4-6 hours as needed
side_effects: Tremor; palpitations; headache; low potassium

name: Aspirin
uses: Low dose: heart attack and stroke prevention. High dose: pain and fever
dosage_child: Avoid in children under 12 (Reye syndrome risk)
side_effects: Stomach bleeding; tinnitus; nausea; allergic reaction
contraindications: Peptic ulcer; bleeding disorders; children under 12; third trimester pregnancy

name: Doxycycline
uses: Malaria prevention; chlamydia; Lyme disease; acne; chest infections
side_effects: Nausea; photosensitivity; esophageal irritation; tooth staining in children
contraindications: Pregnancy; children under 8; severe liver disease

name: ORS
uses: Diarrhea; dehydration; heat exhaustion; vomiting
dosage_adult: 1 sachet in 1 litre water; drink 200-400ml after each loose stool
side_effects: Rare: nausea if taken too fast
contraindications: Anuria (no urine output); severe dehydration needing IV; bowel obstruction

name: Zinc Sulfate
uses: Diarrhea treatment in children; zinc deficiency; wound healing
side_effects: Nausea; vomiting; metallic taste at high doses

name: Vitamin D3
uses: Vitamin D deficiency; rickets; osteoporosis; bone pain
dosage_adult: 60000 IU weekly for 8-12 weeks then monthly maintenance
side_effects: Rare at normal doses; toxicity: nausea and kidney stones at very high doses
interactions: Thiazide diuretics (hypercalcemia); digoxin; steroids reduce absorption

name: Hydroxychloroquine
uses: Malaria; rheumatoid arthritis; lupus; Sjogren syndrome
side_effects: Nausea; retinopathy (long term - needs annual eye check); QT prolongation

name: Clonazepam
uses: Epilepsy; panic disorder; anxiety; restless legs syndrome
side_effects: Drowsiness; dizziness; memory problems; dependence risk
contraindications: Severe liver disease; respiratory depression; pregnancy
interactions: Alcohol (dangerous CNS depression); opioids; other sedatives

name: Losartan
uses: Hypertension; diabetic kidney disease; heart failure
side_effects: Dizziness; high potassium; kidney function changes; rare angioedema

name: Folic Acid
uses: Pregnancy neural tube defect prevention; folate deficiency; anemia
side_effects: Rare; may mask vitamin B12 deficiency
contraindications: Vitamin B12 deficiency without B12 supplementation

name: Iron (Ferrous Sulfate)
uses: Iron deficiency anemia; pregnancy; menstruation-related deficiency
side_effects: Nausea; constipation; black stools; abdominal cramps
interactions: Tetracyclines; zinc; antacids reduce absorption; vitamin C increases absorption
